response.justification: While technically overqualified with extensive fullstack expertise across all required areas (TypeScript, React, databases, cloud services, software craftsmanship), Bogdan's 20+ years of experience and current Staff Engineer role make this a poor fit for an entry-level position. Significant retention and disengagement risks outweigh technical alignment.
strengths: Extensive TypeScript and fullstack expertise with proven mastery across modern frameworks and architectures
Strong emphasis on clean code, testing practices, and software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, pair programming)
Proven ability to work across entire stack including databases, cloud infrastructure, Kubernetes, and DevOps tools
concerns: Severe overqualification: Staff Engineer with 20+ years experience for entry-level role creates high retention and quick-departure risk
Career regression from current senior position to junior responsibilities would likely lead to disengagement and limited growth opportunity
Salary expectations (Staff Engineer level) would significantly exceed junior/mid-level compensation bands
